payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE, verified vs real Postgres. Second increment landed: the ENTIRE existing REST surface (tickets/relations/comments/history/search/batch) now serves hosted tenants via per-tenant replica workspaces (src/auth_hosted/tenant-replica.js) - the hub keeps a local SQLite replica of each tenant PG event log (ADR 0002: the cloud node is just another replica), so every repo.js handler works unchanged. Reads refresh (pull since cursor) before the handler; mutations flush (idempotent uploadEvents) after responding. Replicas are durable under SCOPE_TENANT_DIR beside the volume SCOPE_DIR. /api/workspaces in hosted mode returns the caller projects shaped as workspaces, so the existing web switcher works per-tenant unchanged. Proven in test/multi-tenant-pg.test.js: ticket CRUD through generic handlers, per-tenant ids (ALPHA-1), flush reaches the PG log, cross-tenant REST read 404.
